summary: The diff implements the vast majority of requirements. All 8 REQs have corresponding implementations: mock data (REQ-1), search (REQ-2), filters (REQ-3), backend CRUD (REQ-4), Add modal (REQ-5), Edit modal (REQ-6), Delete confirmation (REQ-7), and React Query integration (REQ-8). One notable gap is that the backend storage does not appear to use stable variables, potentially failing the REQ-4 AC about surviving canister upgrades. Additionally, REQ-4 requires a unique ID assigned by the backend per record, but the implementation uses IP address as the key rather than a separate auto-incremented ID.

missing_requirements.requirement: IP records are stored in stable memory and survive canister upgrades
missing_requirements.reason: The backend uses 'let ipDatabase = Map.empty<Text, IPDatabaseRecord>()' which is a non-stable variable. There is no 'stable var' declaration for the IP database map, so data will not survive canister upgrades.

missing_requirements.requirement: Each record has a unique ID assigned by the backend
missing_requirements.reason: The backend uses the IP address string as the map key rather than assigning a separate unique numeric ID. The IPDatabaseRecord type has no 'id' field and the map key is the IP address itself.

hallucinated_features.description: A two-tab layout on the IPDatabase page combining an 'IP Address Database' tab and an existing 'IP Registry' tab
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked to add or expand an IP Database page; it did not request merging it into a tabbed view with the existing IP registry functionality.
